title: Participate in workplace productivity improvement processes
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Participate in workplace productivity improvement processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine work area productivity

pcs.text: Identify and confirm work area processes, goals, job specifications and workplace requirements 1.2 Monitor work area processes for efficiency and effectiveness using available workplace resources
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm work area processes, goals, job specifications and workplace requirements 1.2 Monitor work area processes for efficiency and effectiveness using available workplace resources?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm work area processes, goals, job specifications and workplace requirements 1.2 Monitor work area processes for efficiency and effectiveness using available workplace resources.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine work area productivity

elements.title: Identify productivity improvement opportunities

pcs.text: Analyse work area processes for problems and identify areas for improvement 2.2 Apply appropriate quality tools and techniques for identifying causes of problems and areas for improvement 2.3 Develop draft recommendations for improvement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse work area processes for problems and identify areas for improvement 2.2 Apply appropriate quality tools and techniques for identifying causes of problems and areas for improvement 2.3 Develop draft recommendations for improvement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse work area processes for problems and identify areas for improvement 2.2 Apply appropriate quality tools and techniques for identifying causes of problems and areas for improvement 2.3 Develop draft recommendations for improvement.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify productivity improvement opportunities

elements.title: Communicate productivity improvement ideas

pcs.text: Present draft recommendations for improvement and discuss with others in a team3.2 Finalise and document recommendations according to workplace procedures3.3 Suggest final recommendations to appropriate personnel according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present draft recommendations for improvement and discuss with others in a team3.2 Finalise and document recommendations according to workplace procedures3.3 Suggest final recommendations to appropriate personnel according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present draft recommendations for improvement and discuss with others in a team3.2 Finalise and document recommendations according to workplace procedures3.3 Suggest final recommendations to appropriate personnel according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Communicate productivity improvement ideas

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
